title: Hiring Store Manager at Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Jaipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd!
